tasks.description: Write personalized outreach email to Messari team for Invoica enterprise pilot
tasks.context:
Write a cold outreach email to Messari's team (likely their engineering or data infrastructure lead).

Context:
- Messari is a crypto market intelligence platform that publishes research on on-chain data
- CMO identified them as actively seeking x402 accounting/invoicing tools for their agent infrastructure
- Invoica is the x402 invoice middleware — the financial OS layer for AI agents
- We just shipped OOBE Protocol integration (LangChain tools: createInvoice, getInvoice, checkSettlement)
- We are in free beta until April 22, 2026 — enterprise pilots get extended free access + white-glove onboarding

Email spec:
- Subject line: specific, references their x402 use case
- Body: ≤ 200 words
- Lead with their problem (x402 accounting gap), not our features
- One concrete proof point: OOBE Protocol integration shipped this week
- One clear CTA: 15-min call or direct beta link (https://invoica.ai)
- Tone: founder-to-founder, technical, no marketing fluff
- Sign as: Tarek Mnif, Invoica

Output file: reports/bizdev/messari-outreach-email.md
Include: subject line, body, and 3 alternative subject lines at the end.

tasks.description: Write Invoica one-pager for AI data platforms (Messari-targeted)
tasks.context:
Write a one-page pitch document for Messari and similar AI/data platforms considering x402 agent infrastructure.

Format: Markdown (will be converted to PDF)
Length: ~400 words, structured with headers

Structure:
1. The Problem (2-3 bullets): AI agents transacting via x402 have no invoice trail, no tax compliance, no audit record
2. Invoica in One Line: x402 invoice middleware — agents earn, spend, and prove it
3. What's Live (bullet list of shipped features):
   - Invoice generation + PDF rendering
   - On-chain settlement detection (EVM + Solana + Polygon)
   - Tax compliance engine (12 countries)
   - SAP B1 ERP integration
   - Trust-gated invoice acceptance
   - OOBE Protocol LangChain SDK integration (this week)
4. Integration: one API call, 4 LangChain tools, works with any x402-capable agent
5. Beta offer: Free until April 22, 2026 — enterprise pilots get extended access
6. CTA: https://invoica.ai | @invoica_ai

Tone: technical, concise, no hype. Written for a CTO or engineering lead.

Output file: reports/bizdev/messari-one-pager.md

tasks.description: Draft enterprise pilot pricing proposal for Messari
tasks.context:
CRITICAL OUTPUT FORMAT: Write plain Markdown directly to the output file. Do NOT wrap content in code fences or backtick blocks. The file must start with a # heading or plain text, not with backticks. Draft a pricing proposal for Messari as an enterprise pilot customer.

Context on current pricing model:
- Free beta until April 22, 2026 (day 61 billing starts)
- Post-beta: tiered by invoice volume and API calls
- Enterprise: custom pricing, SLA, dedicated support
- Goal: first paying customer within 14 days

Proposal spec:
- 3-month pilot: free (covers their evaluation period)
- Month 4+: suggested pricing at $299/month (Pro tier equivalent) or custom enterprise rate
- Include: what's included (all features, dedicated onboarding, API integration support, direct Slack channel with founder)
- Frame as: "Founding Partner" pricing — locked in at beta rate permanently
- Keep it short: ≤ 300 words, 1 table for tier comparison

Output file: reports/bizdev/messari-pricing-proposal.md

review.summary: Written directly by planner after MiniMax produced empty file. Founding Partner framing, tier comparison table, ≤300 words, plain Markdown.
strengths: Founding Partner framing with permanent price lock
Tier comparison table: Pilot / Founding Partner / Standard Enterprise
All included features listed accurately (shipped only)

tasks.description: Write demo walkthrough script for a Messari discovery call
tasks.context:
CRITICAL OUTPUT FORMAT: Write plain Markdown directly to the output file. Do NOT wrap content in code fences or backtick blocks. The file must start with a # heading or plain text, not with backticks. Write a 15-minute demo script for Tarek to use on a discovery call with Messari.

Structure:
1. Opening (2 min): What Invoica is + why now (Stripe MPP launched last week, x402 is winning)
2. Live demo flow (10 min):
   a. Create an invoice via API (show the curl command)
   b. Show settlement detection on-chain
   c. Show tax compliance output (12-country)
   d. Show SAP ERP sync (enterprise proof point)
   e. Show OOBE LangChain integration (their use case)
3. Q&A prep (3 min): 5 likely objections + responses:
   - "We don't use x402 yet" → response
   - "We have our own invoicing" → response
   - "Security/compliance concerns" → response
   - "What about pricing?" → response
   - "Can it integrate with X?" → response

Format: script-style with [TAREK SAYS] and [SHOW ON SCREEN] markers
Tone: technical peer conversation, not a sales pitch

Output file: reports/bizdev/messari-demo-script.md

review.summary: Written directly by planner after MiniMax produced incomplete script. Full 15-min script with [TAREK SAYS]/[SHOW ON SCREEN] markers, all 5 objections, curl examples.
strengths: Actual curl command for invoice creation
[TAREK SAYS] and [SHOW ON SCREEN] markers throughout
Technical peer tone, not a sales pitch
